title: Record soft48 tool4.5k and reserved18 densify

fixtureActions.content:
# Soft48 Tool45k Reserved18 Contract

## Soft 48
soft compaction trigger defaults to 0.48 with quality bias floor 0.46 so reclaim can still tighten after emergency backstops

## Tool 4.5k
tool result budgets default to 4500 chars with 80-char previews for denser reclaim

## Reserved 18k
reserved context headroom defaults to 18k tokens for denser usable windows before hard block

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/tool/status vitest
